commands.name: llamafactory-cli train
commands.description: 使用 LLaMA Factory 进行模型微调训练

commands.name: llamafactory-cli export
commands.description: 导出合并后的 LoRA 模型

commands.name: llamafactory-cli chat
commands.description: 启动交互式对话测试微调模型

commands.name: vllm serve
commands.description: 启动 vLLM OpenAI 兼容推理服务

commands.name: vllm bench latency
commands.description: 测试 vLLM 推理延迟

commands.name: vllm bench throughput
commands.description: 测试 vLLM 推理吞吐量

commands.name: yolo train
commands.description: 使用 Ultralytics YOLO 进行目标检测模型训练
commands.usage: yolo train model=[%s:模型] data=[%s:数据集.yaml] epochs=[%s:轮数]
examples: yolo train model=yolov11s.pt data=[%s:数据集.yaml] imgsz=640 batch=16
yolo train model=yolov8m-seg.pt data=[%s:数据集.yaml] task=segment

commands.name: yolo predict
commands.description: 使用训练好的 YOLO 模型进行推理
commands.usage: yolo predict model=[%s:模型] source=[%s:输入路径]
examples: yolo predict model=[%s:best.pt] source=[%s:图片目录] conf=0.5

commands.name: yolo val
commands.description: 验证 YOLO 模型精度
commands.usage: yolo val model=[%s:模型] data=[%s:数据集.yaml]

commands.name: yolo export
commands.description: 导出 YOLO 模型为 ONNX/TensorRT 等格式
commands.usage: yolo export model=[%s:模型] format=[%s:格式]

commands.name: ollama run
commands.description: 运行本地大语言模型

commands.name: ollama pull
commands.description: 从仓库下载模型到本地

commands.name: ollama list
commands.description: 列出本地已下载的所有模型

commands.name: ollama serve
commands.description: 启动 Ollama API 服务

commands.name: ollama create
commands.description: 从 Modelfile 创建自定义模型

commands.name: huggingface-cli download
commands.description: 从 HuggingFace Hub 下载模型或数据集

commands.name: huggingface-cli upload
commands.description: 上传模型或文件到 HuggingFace Hub

commands.name: huggingface-cli login
commands.description: 登录 HuggingFace Hub

commands.name: torchrun
commands.description: 启动 PyTorch 多 GPU 分布式训练

commands.name: torchserve --start
commands.description: 启动 TorchServe 模型推理服务

commands.name: mlflow ui
commands.description: 启动 MLflow 实验追踪 Web UI

commands.name: mlflow run
commands.description: 运行 MLflow 项目

commands.name: mlflow models serve
commands.description: 部署 MLflow 模型为推理服务

commands.name: tensorboard
commands.description: 启动 TensorBoard 训练可视化

commands.name: deepspeed
commands.description: 使用 DeepSpeed 加速大模型训练

commands.name: accelerate launch
commands.description: 使用 HuggingFace Accelerate 启动分布式训练

commands.name: wandb init
commands.description: 初始化 Weights & Biases 实验追踪

commands.name: wandb sweep
commands.description: 启动 W&B 超参数搜索
